title: Dyeable Books
description: Lets you dye book and quills for your colourful book needs!
body:
Allows you to dye your books and quills to write with. You **must** first dye the book and quill and then write the book, dyeing the written book will not work.

# Currently supported books (and crafting guide)
- Dye colours (dye + book and quill)
- Skull book (bone + book and quill)
- Heart book (redstone dust + book and quill)
- Star book (glowstone dust + book and quill)
- Knowledge (crafting) book (crafting table + book and quill)
- You can add a snowball to reset the book and quill

# Remove enchantment glint
Additionally, adding **sand** to a book and quill will remove the enchantment glint. This must be done in the same recipe as the dyeing.

![Books in the datapack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d846baf84bcb8a8b86d05d8b6f4e5c20671a0ea1.png)
